challenge: Slow monolithic deployments, compliance bottlenecks, manual testing.
architecture: Migration from on-prem monolith to AWS EKS with CI/CD automation.
painPoints: Manual security auditing slows down release cycles.
High error rate directly impacting transactions.
solution: Implemented GitOps with ArgoCD, DevSecOps pipelines with Trivy, and automated infrastructure using Terraform.
results: Deployment time reduced from 3 weeks to 1 hour.
Automated security scans blocked 40% more vulnerabilities pre-production.
